# DELE B1 Practice

> iOS app for preparing the official DELE B1 Spanish exam from Instituto Cervantes.

## About

DELE B1 Practice is a mobile app that helps candidates prepare for the DELE B1 (Diploma de Español como Lengua Extranjera, level B1) exam. It provides 7 complete mock exams in the official Instituto Cervantes format with real audio, AI-powered writing correction, detailed explanations, and progress tracking.

## Key Facts

- Platform: iOS only (App Store)
- Level: B1 (intermediate) per the Common European Framework of Reference (CEFR)
- Content: 7 full mock exams covering reading, listening, writing, and speaking
- Audio: Professional recordings with native speakers
- Writing: Free-form text input with AI scoring and correction
- Progress: Results tracking by section and task
- Practice modes: Daily quick practice + section-specific practice
- Interface languages: 12 (English, Spanish, French, German, Portuguese, Brazilian Portuguese, Italian, Chinese, Japanese, Korean, Arabic, Russian)
- Pricing: First exam free, subscription for full access
- Developer: Independent (not affiliated with Instituto Cervantes)
- Contact: hello@prepdele.com
- Website: https://b1.prepdele.com

## DELE B1 Exam Structure

- Test 1: Reading comprehension (70 min, 5 tasks, 30 items)
- Test 2: Listening comprehension (40 min, 5 tasks, 30 items)
- Test 3: Written expression and interaction (60 min, 2 tasks)
- Test 4: Oral expression and interaction (15 min + 15 min preparation)
- Scoring: Group 1 (reading + listening) and Group 2 (writing + speaking), 50 points each, minimum 30 per group to pass

## Common Use Cases

- Spanish citizenship by residence (language requirement)
- University admission in Spanish-speaking countries
- Professional certification of Spanish proficiency
- Personal language learning goals
